subject: Re: Re[2]: from Moscow
body:

----- Original Message ----
From: nina . <nina-mel@mail.ru>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, October 31, 2006 4:11:34 PM
Subject: Re[2]: from Moscow

Hi Jeffrey! 
How are you? Didn't get a reply from you,did you get my last letter?
I've bought a ticket to NY,coming on thursday,for one week.Would you like to meet?I've booked some hostel for any case,but wanted to ask if maybe it's possible if i stay for 7days in any of your apts.?though no offence,i will understand if it's not possible,-just tell me,so i could know and could plan everything.thank you in any case!hope you are well! 
kisses!!xxx
